completed_tasks.name: Feature Velocity page — sparkline grid with momentum
SDK Versions page — donut + stacked timeline + version table
Engagement Decay page — per-user sparklines, licensed filter, status toggles
User Journey page — Sankey from dim_users first_*_at fields

human_actions_pending.context: team_or_profile_viewed events dropped from 32 users to 2 overnight — customer-specific, not platform-wide

decisions.decision: Separate pages per direction (not tabs in existing reports)
decisions.rationale: Enables parallel prototyping, each independently deployable

decisions.decision: All 9 directions + all differentiators in v1 scope
decisions.rationale: User wants full build, 82 requirements total

decisions.decision: V4 sparkline design: gold bars + event count labels above + user count below in green
decisions.rationale: Iterated through 4 options — lines were misleading, dots were messy, numbers are cleanest
Ghost users appeared with null events but non-null user counts

decisions.decision: Weave suppression via account_health_query weave_customer flag
decisions.rationale: Non-Weave customers showed Weave data from trials
Isomorphic Labs collaboration cliff showed need to distinguish instrumentation changes from behavior

decisions.decision: Always use real data for prototyping, never fake data
decisions.rationale: User feedback — fake data is useless for validating visualizations

decisions.decision: Show deployment type and data provenance on pages
decisions.rationale: Server deployment customers have small SaaS footprints that aren't representative

decisions.decision: SDK versions query: NULLIF for N/A, SPLIT for comma-separated local_version
decisions.rationale: Server deployments have N/A cli_version and comma-separated local_version

decisions.decision: Engagement decay: licensed filter defaults ON using SFDC contracted_seats
decisions.rationale: 238 tracked users vs ~183 licensed — SE wants to focus on licensed users by default

decisions.decision: Engagement decay: hot-first sort, no user cap
decisions.rationale: Cold-first with 50 cap hid all hot/warm/cooling users

decisions.decision: Identity resolution: prefer username > email local-part > user-ID fallback
decisions.rationale: Some server deployment users have email but no username in dim_users

decisions.decision: User Journey: auto-suppress empty stages (license for server, weave for non-weave)
decisions.rationale: Empty stages add noise without information

next_action: Phase 3 is being built in a parallel session. Phase 4 (Usage Correlation + Performance) needs ui-spec then plan before execution. Start with /gsd:ui-phase for Phase 4, then /gsd:plan-phase.
context_notes: Phase 2 was built without formal GSD plans — we iterated directly against real BQ data after user pushed back on overly formal phasing. The pattern is well-established: query in queries.py -> transform class -> handler in generate.py -> renderer in base-template.html -> PAGE_RENDERERS entry. V1-V3 dead renderer code for feature velocity still in template. Phase 3 (Cohort, Team, Risk) being built in parallel session. Phase 4 tables (fct_application_performance, usage correlation cross-account) have LOW data confidence — may need descoping.
